testcase.name: test_content_posts_tag_foundation_cross_match

failure.message: AssertionError: expected >=4 Foundation-tagged posts (including cross-match), got 3 assert 3 >= 4 + where 3 = len([{'post_id': 'post_pomodorofailsfor', 'slug': 'pomodoro-fails-for-numericals', 'title': 'Why 25/5 Pomodoro fails for numericals', 'excerpt': "A rebuttal to the internet's favourite productivity system, plus the working-set-based method that actually holds up under Costing pressure.", ...}, {'post_id': 'post_notesvsrecall', 'slug': 'notes-vs-recall', 'title': 'Notes vs. recall: pick one', 'excerpt': "The single biggest waste of study time in CA prep is prettified notes. Here's the case for switching to active recall — with evidence.", ...}, {'post_id': 'post_mentalhealthduri', 'slug': 'mental-health-during-ca', 'title': 'Mental health during CA prep', 'excerpt': 'Nobody talks about it enough. A frank essay on burnout, isolation, and how to prep sustainably for a multi-year exam.', ...}])

testcase.failure: tests/test_phase5_mocks_flashcards.py:55: in test_content_posts_tag_foundation_cross_match assert len(items) >= 4, f"expected >=4 Foundation-tagged posts (including cross-match), got {len(items)}" E AssertionError: expected >=4 Foundation-tagged posts (including cross-match), got 3 E assert 3 >= 4 E + where 3 = len([{'post_id': 'post_pomodorofailsfor', 'slug': 'pomodoro-fails-for-numericals', 'title': 'Why 25/5 Pomodoro fails for numericals', 'excerpt': "A rebuttal to the internet's favourite productivity system, plus the working-set-based method that actually holds up under Costing pressure.", ...}, {'post_id': 'post_notesvsrecall', 'slug': 'notes-vs-recall', 'title': 'Notes vs. recall: pick one', 'excerpt': "The single biggest waste of study time in CA prep is prettified notes. Here's the case for switching to active recall — with evidence.", ...}, {'post_id': 'post_mentalhealthduri', 'slug': 'mental-health-during-ca', 'title': 'Mental health during CA prep', 'excerpt': 'Nobody talks about it enough. A frank essay on burnout, isolation, and how to prep sustainably for a multi-year exam.', ...}])

testcase.name: test_sm2_grade_3_on_new_card

skipped.message: no unstudied cards in this deck
